seo.title: Cream poffertjies - you can bake this - Marinda Kook

html:
Cream poffertjies look difficult to bake. Believe me, they're not. It's easier than making scrambled eggs. It's such a lovely versatile thing. It can be filled sweet or savoury. Try it. People are usually terribly impressed when you make it. Easy and delicious!

 

YOU NEED:

  • 250 ml water
  • 125 ml butter
  • 250 ml flour
  • 4 eggs

NOW:

  1. boil the water and butter together until the butter has melted
  2. stir in all the flour at once until it comes away from the sides
  3. remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the eggs one at a time, thoroughly.
  4. spray a baking tray with non-stick spray
  5. use a teaspoon and spoon little mounds of the dough onto the baking tray
  6. bake for 20 minutes at 190 degrees Celsius and then another 20 minutes at 160 degrees Celsius
  7. let it cool on a wire rack

You can fill it with cream, caramel or anything of your choice.

I whipped 250 ml cream with 80 ml icing sugar and 2.5 ml vanilla essence.

Then I melted one slab of chocolate with 80 ml cream in the microwave and dipped the poffertjies into it.

 

If you're working with savoury fillings, you can flavour cream cheese and fill it with cream cheese, tuna or salmon. The choice is yours.
